{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's Binance.US?" %}

{% trans 'Binance.US is the United States-regulated arm of Binance, specifically designed for U.S. residents. It provides a secure and compliant platform for trading cryptocurrencies with features including:' %}

  • {% trans 'Regulated cryptocurrency trading for U.S. residents' %}
  • {% trans 'Competitive trading fees' %}
  • {% trans 'Secure API integration for automated trading' %}
  • {% trans 'Compliance with U.S. regulations and requirements' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with Binance.US?' %}

{% trans 'With Binance.US, only Spot trading is supported.' %}

{% trans 'Your account must have sufficient base and quote asset balances to trade in both directions.' %}

{% trans 'Spot Trading' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units.' %}

{% trans 'API Key Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'follow the steps below to configure your API Keys.' %}

{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your API keys with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a Binance.US Account' %}

{% trans 'If you don’t already have a Binance.US account, please sign up' %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Navigate to API Management' %}

  1. {% trans 'Log in to your Binance.US account.' %}
  2. {% trans 'Click your Email/Username at the top-right corner.' %}
  3. {% trans 'Select "API Management" from the dropdown menu.' %}

3 {% trans 'Generate an API Key' %}

  1. {% trans 'Enter a name for your key.' %}
  2. {% trans 'click "Create API".' %}

4 {% trans 'Configure Security Settings' %}

  1. {% trans 'Click "Edit restrictions."' %}
  2. {% trans 'Enable "Restrict access to trusted IPs only" and add our server’s IP address.' %}
  3. {% trans 'Enable "Spot Trading."' %}
  4. {% trans 'Copy your API keys and then click "Save."' %}

{% trans 'IMPORTANT: Ensure you copy your secret key before saving changes.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your API keys, return to our platform's Automate section and use them to link your Binance account with our automation system. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}
